012221211200201000111102202102000001 - ASI: 24

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  02 = 0 * 2
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  21 = 2 * 1
  22 = 2 * 2
  200 = 2 * 00
  211 = 2 * 11
  0001 = 00 * 01
  0122 = 01 * 22
  1110 = 11 * 10
  2002 = 200 * 2
  2202 = 22 * 02
  10200 = 10 * 200
  21211 = 21 * 211
  010001 = 01 * 0001
  11102202 = 1110 * 2202
  012221211 = 0122 * 21211
  102000001 = 10200 * 0001
  2002010001 = 2002 * 010001
  11102202102000001 = 11102202 * 102000001
  0122212112002010001 = 012221211 * 2002010001
  012221211200201000111102202102000001 = 0122212112002010001 * 11102202102000001
